name: Chilied Red Bean Dip
recipeIngredient: Thin slivers fresh red and green chilies
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a skillet over medium heat.
2. Add garlic, onion, green chili, and chili powder. Cook gently for 4 minutes.
3. Drain kidney beans and reserve the juice. Reserve 3 tablespoons of the beans. Process the remaining beans into a puree using a blender or food processor.
4. Add the bean puree to the onion mixture and stir in 2 tablespoons of the reserved bean liquid. Mix well.
5. Stir in the reserved beans and cheese. Cook gently for about 2 minutes, stirring until the cheese melts. Season with salt and mix well.
6. If the mixture becomes too thick, add a little more of the reserved bean liquid. Spoon into a serving dish and garnish with chilies and parsley sprig (if desired). Serve warm with tortilla chips.
